name: naver-ai-blogger
description: Codex plugin for publishing restaurant posts to Naver Blog.
author: Vicky

scripts.check: node --check bin/naver-ai-blogger.js && node --check bin/naver.js && node --check bin/naver-blog.js && node --check scripts/scan-secrets.js && node --check scripts/sync-plugin-wrapper.js && node --check scripts/validate-plugin.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/naver/auth.js && node --check src/naver/client.js && node --check src/naver/editor.js && node --check src/naver/images.js && node --check src/naver/session.js && node --check src/naver/utils.js && node --check test/cli.test.js && node --check test/editor.test.js && bash -n scripts/install-prompts.sh && bash -n scripts/live-smoke.sh && bash -n scripts/verify-public-install.sh
